title: opophytum forskahlii
intro: Opophytum forskahlii, also known as the Coleus forskohlii or Indian Coleus, is a tropical plant native to the subtropical regions of India and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of forskolin, a labdane diterpenoid compound that has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and cardio-protective effects. The health benefits of Opophytum forskahlii include lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, and promoting weight loss, as well as improving exercise performance and endurance. Opophytum forskahlii is typically prepared as a dietary supplement in capsule or tablet form, and may also be consumed as a tea or added to herbal remedies.
